case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. JOSE CELEDIO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ( CCP 1033) 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS ( EVID 15500 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-10-2007 CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
